title: Ledger Fragment
description: Shape of one on-disk fragment written by ledger_update.py to runs/ledger.d/{seg}.json. Composes ledger-record-base.schema.json via allOf and layers its own narrower `status` enum -- NO `stale`, ever, since these are the only statuses ledger_update.py itself writes to a fragment (`stale` is a status ledger_merge.py computes only in the materialized ledger.json, never found on disk here). Uses `unevaluatedProperties: false` rather than `additionalProperties: false`, since the latter cannot see properties satisfied by a sibling allOf branch (the base schema's properties) and would incorrectly reject them; unevaluatedProperties is allOf/$ref-aware.
